title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Appoints Luis Rivera President of Berkley Global Product Recall
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the appointment of Luis Rivera as president of Berkley Global Product Recall. Mr. Rivera succeeds Louis Lubrano, who has been named chairman of the business. The appointments are effective immediately. Mr. Rivera is a veteran executive with more than 25 years of commercial property and casualty insurance experience in underwriting, claims and management. title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names Michael Marcus President of Berkley Industrial Comp
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the appointment of Michael Marcus as president of Berkley Industrial Comp. He succeeds Chandler F. Cox, Jr., who has been named chairman of the business. The appointments are effective immediately. Mr. Marcus joined Berkley in 2008 as a regional director at Key Risk and most recently served as Key Risk's senior vice president – sales, distribution and business analytics.
